who: medical billing coordinators in small clinics processing 10–20 claims/month
offer: For medical billing coordinators in small clinics processing 10–20 claims/month, frequent errors in insurance claim submissions cause cash flow gaps. We streamline the conversion of medical billing codes into insurance claim submissions instead of manual submission of claims using spreadsheets.
problem: Frequent errors in insurance claim submissions due to manual coding.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for medical billing coordinators
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to medical billing coordinators with demo video
Participate in community forums for sharing tools
try_it: Let users try manual entry of billing codes and error-checking for common coding mistakes on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a 1-page landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
Enable one-click export of simple reports
